This is the beginning of testcase case1. Please output a copy of the log into case1.log.
Load design from top.v in directory testdata/design/
What is the maximum logic depth from input in0 to output out0?
List all buffers whose name includes _gc__
Replace the buffers that contain _gc__ with an AND gate and connect the other input to 1'b1.
Write out the design to testdata/case1_out.v
